feed.title: SkillsLLM

author.name: SkillsLLM & the MCP / Claude Skills ecosystem

feed.subtitle: AI tooling news and guides: SkillsLLM, Desktop Commander, Model Context Protocol, FastMCP, ClaudePluginHub, MCP Servers blog, and Claude Skills Hub

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Antigravity Awesome Skills with 1,848 supported skills.

entry.title: showsignature
entry.content: Fast structural and implementation-oriented overview of source code files and markdown.

entry.title: dsg-governance
entry.content: AI Governance Control Plane that makes every Agent decision provable, auditable, and replayable — Deterministic Safety Gate (Z3/SMT), Cryptographic Proof, Replayable Governance, Compliance Evidence Pack, and Hermes Controlled Executor. Built for VC, CTO, Enterprise Buyer, and Governance Team standards.

entry.title: ai-dev-assistant
entry.content: An AI assistant for developers that focuses on getting the process right, not just getting code out fast. It runs each task through Research → Architecture → Implementation → Review before code gets written, and checks the work against your standards (SOLID, TDD, DRY, security) with gates the AI can't quietly skip. Decisions stay grounded in best-practice guides instead of whatever the model guessed. Stack-agnostic, so stack specifics live in consumable dev-guides, recipes, and playbooks.

entry.title: sl
entry.content: workflow-marketplace - Claude Code 工作流市场插件，提供技能创建指南和预置工作流

entry.title: daimon
entry.content: Dream-briefing for AI coding agents: a cognitive checkpoint at session end, a 'while you were away' briefing at session start.

entry.title: macaron
entry.content: Macaron artifacts for Claude Code and Codex — streaming GenUI builder, model switcher, and visual session manager.

entry.title: glm-hammer
entry.content: Forge-and-hammer engineering harness: storyline-driven design tokens verified by a designer panel (crucible), recon-first strong planning verified by a 3-critic panel, and a worker-validator-critic implementation loop with security/QA review gates enforced by hooks.

entry.title: groundcrew
entry.content: Put your AI on TrustGrowth's growth team: standups, audits, fix-my-site, keyword scouting, competitor watch, E-E-A-T review, and claim-safe reporting.

entry.title: soapbox-agent
entry.content: Soapbox core sustainability intelligence — RSRA, CRREM pathways, retrofit advisor, and report template engine. Skills, agents, and MCP tools for real estate sustainability teams.

entry.title: grimoire
entry.content: Grimoire — a composing suite of Agent Skills distilling the R-Ladies guide (guide.rladies.org) into on-demand spells for the community and global team: apply the R-Ladies brand and voice, write and translate blog posts, draft and schedule social media, coordinate abstract review, run chapters and events, maintain the website, and run pre-human-review checks the R-Ladies way.

entry.title: fns-build-factory
entry.content: FNS Build Factory — a complete client-acquisition build system: websites (Site Factory), funnels (Funnel Builder), cold email (Email Sequence Writer), GHL automation (GHL Workflow Generator), and full apps (Build Factory). Wired to the Parts Factory component MCP.

entry.title: claude-code-dashboard
entry.content: Local web dashboard for Claude Code — monitor rate limits, manage agents/skills/hooks/MCP servers, browse session history, track daily activity and usage rankings

entry.title: sparq
entry.content: Usage skills for the sparq RDF triplestore + SPARQL 1.1/1.2 engine (Rust/CLI/HTTP/Python/WASM + reasoning, SHACL, full-text, vector, GeoSPARQL, RSP-QL, ZK query proofs).

entry.title: getyourguide
entry.content: GetYourGuide tours and activities for Claude — search, details, options, and reviews via MCP

entry.title: ai-employee-builder
entry.content: Public AI Employee Builder shell: auto-routing skill stubs + proactive hooks that connect buyers to the gated AIEB MCP server.

entry.title: opentable-mcp
entry.content: OpenTable reservation management for Claude — find slots, book, cancel, list reservations, manage favorites, search restaurants. Relays through a companion Chrome extension in your signed-in opentable.com tab.

entry.title: infinitecampus-mcp
entry.content: Infinite Campus (Campus Parent) MCP server for Claude — grades, attendance, assignments, messages, and documents

entry.title: jig
entry.content: Spec-driven, review-enforced, hook-gated AI-native development workflow for Claude Code

entry.title: olko-agent-skills
entry.content: Agent-agnostic skill catalog for Codex, Claude, Cursor, Grok, Copilot, Windsurf, Kiro, and other skill-aware tools.

entry.title: cowork-to-code-bridge
entry.content: Connect Claude Cowork to Claude Code on your own computer (macOS or Linux). Cowork hands a task to a local Claude Code agent (and can run approved scripts too); the bridge is idempotent, streams progress, and is token-protected. Install with one command; it sets up a global Cowork skill so every session connects automatically — no /plugin, no setup inside Cowork.

entry.title: critical-thinking-for-humans
entry.content: A gym for your critical thinking. The AI is the coach; you do the work. Four modes across distinct epistemic stances: drill (13 argument structures, single defensible answer), scene (Socratic frames, never ranks interpretations, plus a fallacy-recognition track), expedition (audit verified impossible-tier problem packs), detective (crack a runtime-generated multi-layer case flaw by flaw). Manipulation-recognition domain, fourteen redlines, and a longitudinal passport on your own machine.

entry.title: pi-stuff
entry.content: pi-stuff — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: visual-eyes
entry.content: Give Claude Code eyes to see and analyze running web applications. Visual testing, regression detection, and auto-fix.

entry.title: video-recap-skills
entry.content: Turn any video into a Chinese-narration recap on ffmpeg + one Xiaomi MiMo API key: understanding (ASR + VLM) -> narration -> cut -> voiceover -> assemble. A bundle of independent skills + a thin orchestrator. Runs on macOS, Linux, and Windows.

entry.title: temper
entry.content: Temper: Quality gates, blast radius analysis, and intent-driven development for AI-generated code

entry.title: carta-cc
entry.content: Maps, connects, and remembers your documentation. Structural scanning, LLM semantic audit, Qdrant embedding, and semantic search.

entry.title: context-mode
entry.content: MCP server that saves 98% of your context window with session continuity. Sandboxed code execution in 11 languages, FTS5 knowledge base with BM25 ranking, and automatic state restore across compactions.

entry.title: mantle
entry.content: Core Mantle SDK skills for generated sites, marketplace capabilities, theming, updates, and production handoff.

entry.title: cc-native
entry.content: Keep Claude Code feature-aware against weekly releases: feature-guide skill, edit-time reminder + lint + audit for .claude/ artifacts.

entry.title: sam-gov
entry.content: SAM.gov + USAspending + Federal Register + eCFR + Grants.gov for Claude — 36 keyless tools wrapped as MCP server + Skill workflow guide.

entry.title: hypo
entry.content: LLM-native personal wiki system — session-aware knowledge base for Claude Code

entry.title: magician
entry.content: Full-stack SDLC plugin with dynamic project inspection, a local code knowledge-graph + cache, cross-session reference memory, self-learning, parallel agent orchestration, and feature comprehend→port/integrate (/transmute)

entry.title: agent-skills
entry.content: 33 production agent skills: infra, research, posters, 8 Orca autonomous MISSIONS (spec-to-ship, clean-sweep, red-team-harden, flake-zero, test-debt-zero, dep-fresh, docs-truth, perf-sweep), a runtime-native fleet-ops layer, and Matt/gstack role fleets. Worker playbooks from mattpocock, gstack, and addyosmani; one router per worker. MIT.

entry.title: conductor
entry.content: Spec-Driven Development Orchestration Plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: kuru
entry.content: Enterprise delivery harness: charter -> spec -> vertical slices -> build -> independent verification -> review, with deterministic gates and file-based handoffs for long-running coding agents.

entry.title: callback
entry.content: Job application MCP workflows for profile onboarding, resume tailoring, lead scanning, and application review.

entry.title: skills
entry.content: Opinionated git and mise skills, plus boilerplate commands, agents, and hooks.

entry.title: yasunori0418-skills
entry.content: AI agent skills (Claude Code / Codex) following the agentskills.io standard.

entry.title: ai-pm-assistant
entry.content: Senior PM co-pilot - converts raw inputs into decision-ready PM artefacts across the full delivery lifecycle

entry.title: kastell
entry.content: Server security auditing, hardening, and fleet management. Runtime-derived audit catalog, CIS/PCI-DSS/HIPAA compliance, production hardening workflows, and first-party MCP tools. Supports Hetzner, DigitalOcean, Vultr, Linode with Coolify, Dokploy, and bare VPS modes.

entry.title: makepad-skills
entry.content: Comprehensive Makepad UI framework assistant with auto-routing, widget patterns, shaders, animations, and production-ready Robius patterns from Robrix/Moly codebases

entry.title: seldonframe
entry.content: Build, deploy, and sell AI agents for local-service businesses — from your IDE. One command creates a live hosted workspace on *.app.seldonframe.com: website, booking page, intake form, CRM, and an AI receptionist, in about 3 minutes. No signup, no key for your first workspace. Set SELDONFRAME_API_KEY later to unlock more workspaces, custom domains, and marketplace selling.

entry.title: sparring
entry.content: AI peer review — Claude writes, Cursor/Codex/GLM challenges

entry.title: claude-code-stack
entry.content: Orchestration stack: foreman + subagents, session/handoff skills, cost & brevity guardrails, and design/data toolchains. Skills are gated at runtime by .claude/stack-config.json.

entry.title: devpowers
entry.content: Developer productivity skills: GitHub Actions runner and checker, PR/CI status checker, Jira setup and ticket creator, git commit helper, markdown shortener, local/remote Docker debuggers, MCP server setup, and an e2e UI screenshot report generator.

entry.title: lore
entry.content: Share Claude Code and Cowork sessions to Lore and read threads back.

entry.title: xentral-connector
entry.content: Xentral Agent OS — connector and skills.

entry.title: legion
entry.content: OpenCode orchestration for autonomous development

entry.title: lurii-cc
entry.content: Personal portfolio management for Lurii Finance. Skills: portfolio-advisor (ranked quantitative review, memory-driven, multilingual, Cowork artifact), memory-init + memory-curator (workspace `memory/`), categorization-curator (type/category rules: dry-run, dedup, transfer linking), cash-update (per-currency manual cash with diff), source-manage (add/edit/rename/delete sources, schema-driven, cascade gated). Bundles lurii-finance MCP (pfm-mcp).

entry.title: wicked-testing
entry.content: Standalone QE library — 5-core testing surface (plan/authoring/execution/review/insight), SQLite ledger with fixed-SQL oracle, optional wicked-bus + wicked-brain integration.

entry.title: sidecar
entry.content: Project-agnostic AI coding sidecar — SELF-CONTAINED Claude Code plugin: governance hooks (guards + injects) AND the sidecar CLI itself (bin/ · cli/ · lib/ · modules/ · config/ · templates/ · styles/) ship as ONE unit. Hooks run the plugin's own bundled CLI via ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}, so `/plugin update` + reload refreshes everything together — no per-project copy, no separate `sidecar self-update`. Slash commands ship as BARE `/cmd` via `sidecar shadow` (user-scope ~/.claude/commands), NOT plugin-namespaced — see `commands: []` below. Falls back to a global `sidecar` on PATH when present.

entry.title: grimoire
entry.content: Every field's professional best practices — your expert consultant in engineering, medicine, law, finance, and more. Anywhere, anytime.

entry.title: legal-skills
entry.content: 面向法律从业者的 Claude Skills 集合，包含文档转换、音频转录、网页抓取等专业工具

entry.title: claude-skills
entry.content: Four-layer project workflow for Claude Code: design (load-bearing decisions) → project-init → sprint (engine) → autopilot (orchestrator). Bundles the skills plus the L3 forbidden-action guard and a sprint-done documentation suggester as hooks.

entry.title: hermes-tweet
entry.content: Native Hermes Agent X/Twitter plugin for Xquik automation with read-first workflows and approval-gated actions.

entry.title: yutori
entry.content: Web monitoring (Scouts), deep research, and browser automation

entry.title: gh
entry.content: GitHub workspace initialization and API documentation corpus. Run init once, then use gh CLI directly with routing guide and corpus for GraphQL/REST operations.

entry.title: kernel
entry.content: Durable project memory, bounded JSON handoffs, engineering workflows, and independent verification for Claude Code and Codex. KERNEL 8 includes 34 skills and 15 specialized agent definitions.

entry.title: agentcomm
entry.content: Multi-agent mailbox CLI — any git remote is a bus (git+ssh/github/sqlite/s3/gcs/postgres). register/send/inbox/wait/claim/log/channels so Claude coordinates with other agents or sessions; auto-selects the repo bus inside a git repo.

entry.title: dev-tools-skills
entry.content: All-in-one development toolkit: universal project init (dt:init), project hook installer (dt:install-project-hooks), study assistant (dt:study), git push (dt:push), serial command execution loop (dt:execute-loop), plugin management (dt:update-remote-plugins), Codex config sync (dt:codex-sync-push/pull), code annotation (dt:code-note), Cloudflare tunnel (dt:to-public-cloudflare), work report generator (dt:work-report), local worktree isolation (dt:local-worktree), Android tools (adt:*), and Flutter tools (fdt:*).

entry.title: vs
entry.content: Plan-to-ship workflow skills for shaping ideas, building autonomously, reviewing code, and shipping PRs with agent discipline.

entry.title: juggle
entry.content: Multi-topic conversation orchestrator. Manage parallel conversation threads within a single Claude Code session — discuss one topic while background agents research or build for others.

entry.title: plan-runner
entry.content: Take a Markdown implementation plan, run it through a parallel agent swarm with per-wave verification, and generate a bug-fix plan for re-runs; TDD red-green mode on by default (--no-tdd to disable) with per-task red/green gate evidence; auto-detects Claude Code Agent Teams for token-lean orchestration with a subagent fallback. Tallies best-effort token usage for every dispatched subagent (analyzer, dev agents, verifiers, aggregator) into manifest.json token_usage with a grand total and honest coverage counters, surfaced in dashboards, an end-of-run per-phase Token Report with top consumers, and the PR stats. On the teams backend each wave is verifier-gated: the lead waits on the verifier's actual task result (never self-verifies) and a coverage gate before aggregation backfills any missing verdict, so a PR cannot open while a verifier is still outstanding. git is optional: when absent (no binary or not a repo) all git operations are skipped. Before opening the PR, syncs a code-atlas architecture index (runs /code-atlas:update when .code-atlas/ is present) so the index reflects what was implemented. Verification coverage is configurable via a .plan-runner.yml verify_mode (per-agent | per-wave | last-wave-only) or a --verify flag; lower modes verify fewer waves, record the rest as SKIPPED (distinct from UNVERIFIABLE), and force a draft PR with a banner. Final step opens or updates a proper PR via the plan-runner:pr skill (conventional title, rich body, draft when bugs remain).

entry.title: elements-of-style
entry.content: Writing guidance based on William Strunk Jr.'s The Elements of Style (1918)

entry.title: maos
entry.content: MAOS (Multi-Agent OS) - Coordination Framework for AI Agents with Orchestration, Sentinel Protocol, Worktree Governance, Status Maps, Forge Meta-Agent, Governance Protocols

entry.title: stackchanmcp
entry.content: Stack-chan physical event channel for Claude Code — touch tap / stroke notifications from the desktop robot delivered as Channels messages.

entry.title: create-cmp
entry.content: The AI delivery harness for Kotlin/Compose Multiplatform: scaffolds a green-building app (Android + iOS) by conversational interview, then holds any AI coding agent (Claude Code) to a machine-enforced definition of correct — a spec-driven verify lane that refuses "done" without a committed evidence receipt, dependency-free conformance gates, in-project generation skills that extend the app right-by-construction, a Stop-hook enforcement layer, and an AI-native Compose inspector (structured JSON, no screenshots) for catching design-token drift. Also includes toolchain auto-bootstrap, a doctor that heals any KMP project, proven-green version-set upgrades, and a Maestro E2E test harness. Wraps the same deterministic engine as `npx create-cmp-cli` (published npm name; installs the `create-cmp` command).

entry.title: bon
entry.content: GTD-native work tracker for AI coding agents — outcomes, actions, tactical steps

entry.title: open-agent-hub
entry.content: Unified capability management center for Skills, Agents, and Commands.

entry.title: preludium-skills
entry.content: Personal skill library - curated Claude Code skills for compressed communication, code review, and development workflows.

entry.title: loupe
entry.content: Full-text code search skill for Claude Code — substring and regex across UTF-8/Shift_JIS/EUC-JP files. Uses MCP tools when available, falls back to loupe CLI.

entry.title: building-flutter-apps
entry.content: Flutter app architecture skill: Riverpod 3 codegen, Freezed 3 sealed, GoRouter typed-route SSOT, Hive CE persistence, Crashlytics, gen-l10n. Pairs with the external flutter_skill_lints analyzer plugin (wired via analysis_options.yaml) for AST-level enforcement. Bundles PostToolUse, Stop, and UserPromptSubmit hooks that auto-fire only inside Flutter projects.

entry.title: openquok
entry.content: Openquok CLI skill for the social media scheduling API — integrations, posts, uploads, analytics (JSON output for agents).

entry.title: servo
entry.content: Closed-loop scaffolder for unattended agent operations: oracle scoring, headless agent loops, hooks, and worktree races — tailored to each project's signals.

entry.title: tim-skills
entry.content: Claude Code skills for naming, market research, public-X research, teaching + polished course production (teach-enhance: a self-contained /teach with read-aloud, reading aids, unified diagrams, content patterns), and Open Knowledge Format (OKF) knowledge bases: domain-search, ssr-market-research, xquik-x-research, teach-enhance, and the OKF family (okf-new-kb, okf-ingest, okf-query, okf-lint).

entry.title: ai-mentor
entry.content: Learn the Claude Code capabilities you didn't know existed. A discovery mentor that reads your setup, remembers what you already use, and teaches your highest-leverage gap — one demonstrated move at a time, grounded in your repo, never repeating itself.

entry.title: ai-agent-toolkit
entry.content: Source-first AI-agent toolkit with native Claude Code plugin metadata, English setup routing, Windows-safe hook repair, opt-in repo auto-update, and local bridge adapters.

entry.title: babok_analyst
entry.content: BABOK v3 business analysis agent with 16 MCP tools, 9 stage resources, and human-in-the-loop approval gates.

entry.title: performance-marketing-skills
entry.content: Comprehensive performance marketing skills for AI agents — Google Ads, Meta Ads, Microsoft Ads, LinkedIn Ads, TikTok Ads, programmatic/DV360, Amazon Ads, cross-platform measurement, budgeting, creative testing, account audits, reporting, and safe MCP/API integration

entry.title: baz
entry.content: Indexed cross-repo search and AI-assisted planning for your org's codebase: search, grep, and file-find across every repo without cloning, plus a guided planning workflow that lets your team collaborate on plans together in Baz.

entry.title: deep-research
entry.content: Modular deep research plugin for Claude Code with auto-scaling, mandatory batched adversarial verification, curl link gate, and self-check

entry.title: sage
entry.content: AI skills framework: UNDERSTAND → ENVISION → DELIVER. Mechanical process enforcement, 9 workflows, 12 core skills (+ installable packs), 5 agent personas.

entry.title: codeops
entry.content: Universal AI-development workflow: planning, requirements engineering, reverse-engineering, disambiguation, preflight audits, architecture docs, roadmaps, upgrades, and git commit flows. Ported from codeops-mcp.

entry.title: agent
entry.content: /launch-agent slash command — interview-driven scaffolding for the bborbe agent platform (clone template repo, generate Config CRD + vault page + scenario)

entry.title: wax-skills
entry.content: Agent skills for Wax design-system analysis, registry authoring, and CLI workflows

entry.title: quarry-dev
entry.content: Local semantic search for Claude Code: /find, /ingest, /remember, /explain, /source, /quarry

entry.title: cad-claude-plugin
entry.content: Co-facilitador de descoberta aumentada (CAD): escaneia fontes, extrai fatos com evidência rastreável e sintetiza artefatos fiéis a Lean Inception, DDD e Event Storming sobre um substrato neutro.

entry.title: slop-cop
entry.content: Detect and fix LLM-generated prose tells via the slop-cop CLI. Ships a self-review skill for the agent and bootstraps the binary on first use.

entry.title: superloopy
entry.content: Lightweight loop harness with strict evidence gates — Claude Code edition.

entry.title: daisyui
entry.content: Official daisyUI component library skill. The mandatory UI library for Tailwind CSS. TRIGGER when generating any HTML or JSX code even if the user does not explicitly ask for this skill.

entry.content: Track agent team task assignment, messages, and tool use across Claude Code sessions

entry.title: tfstackplan
entry.content: tfstackplan CLI helper extension for managing Terraform state operations, plan visibility, and agentic workflows

entry.title: issueflow
entry.content: Issue-driven Git Flow-lite workflow skills for Claude Code, including autonomous cycles, parallel worktree scheduling, and compound learning.

entry.title: kr-research-kit
entry.content: AI-native Korean + U.S. equity research skill pack — DART filings, SEC EDGAR/XBRL, sell-side consensus, foreign-IB coverage, 5-panel charts, daily market news, and Naver-blog publishing. Primary-source-first.

entry.title: tt-awesome
entry.content: Claude Code plugin for the Awesome Tenstorrent list. Provides /tt-awesome:add-project to guide contributors through submitting new entries.

entry.title: session-sync
entry.content: Cross-device synchronization for Claude Code sessions and settings via iCloud Drive

entry.title: assistant
entry.content: A multi-agent, ticket-to-PR development pipeline. Orchestrates specialized agents that take an implementation brief from ticket authoring through planning, coding, review, testing, quality gating, and PR publication.

entry.title: plur
entry.content: Persistent, local-first shared memory for AI agents. Corrections, preferences, and conventions persist across sessions, tools, and machines — stored as plain YAML on your disk, with zero-cost local search.

entry.title: ecc
entry.content: Battle-tested Claude Code plugin for engineering teams — 38 agents, 156 skills, 72 legacy command shims, production-ready hooks, and selective install workflows evolved through continuous real-world use

entry.content: Multi-agent orchestration system for Claude Code

entry.content: Codacy skills for Claude Code: query issues, enrich code reviews, and configure Codacy for your project.

entry.title: mattpocock-skills
entry.content: mattpocock-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: cowork-plugin
entry.content: 32 marketing skills for AI agents — conversion optimization, copywriting, SEO, paid ads, and growth.

entry.title: ecc
entry.content: Battle-tested Claude Code plugin for engineering teams — 38 agents, 156 skills, 72 legacy command shims, production-ready hooks, and selective install workflows evolved through continuous real-world use

entry.title: ouroboros
entry.content: Self-improving AI workflow system. Crystallize requirements before execution with Socratic interview, ambiguity scoring, and 3-stage evaluation.

entry.title: cm
entry.content: CodyMaster v7.0 — 50 token-optimized AI agent skills (progressive disclosure, ~100 tok index → SKILL.md on demand) + 11 slash commands + 5 sub-agents + cm-context MCP server. Browse Hybrid Bridge, a11y snapshots, structured error collection, video recording.

entry.title: copilotkit
entry.content: AI agent skills for CopilotKit — setup, develop, integrate, debug, upgrade, and contribute to CopilotKit projects

entry.title: humanize
entry.content: Humanize - An iterative development plugin that uses Codex to review Claude's work. Creates a feedback loop where Claude implements plans and Codex independently reviews progress, ensuring quality through continuous refinement.

entry.title: nsys-ai
entry.content: GPU profile analysis for NVIDIA Nsight Systems. Triage bottlenecks, diagnose NCCL, compute MFU, compare regressions, and drill into SASS instructions. Requires the nsys-ai CLI (>= 0.2.2): pip install nsys-ai.

entry.title: brave-mcp
entry.content: Reliable automation, in-depth debugging, and performance analysis in Brave using DevTools and Puppeteer

entry.title: mempalace
entry.content: Give your AI a memory — mine projects and conversations into a searchable palace. 19 MCP tools, auto-save hooks, and guided setup.

entry.title: arete
entry.content: Cognitive brainstorming protocol for Claude Code. Structures thinking through GROUND (problem discovery) -> EXPLORE (divergent) -> DECIDE (convergent) -> STRESS (stress-test) -> SHIP (artifacts) phases. Includes domain skills for technical architecture and conceptual work.

entry.title: oh-my-qemu
entry.content: QEMU agent skills, a /qemu-init-task command, and an artifact-policy hook for modeling, source builds, image packaging, boot testing, qtest, debugging, and TCG workflows.

entry.title: edmunds-claude-code
entry.content: Edmund's personal Claude Code setup with 14 productivity commands and 11 specialized AI agents for modern web development

entry.title: strassenverkehrsrecht-stvo
entry.content: StVO-/Straßenverkehrsrecht-Plugin für Verkehrsregeln, Zeichen, Anordnungen, Ausnahmegenehmigungen, Fahrerlaubnis, Bußgeld-Schnittstellen und Behördenpraxis.

entry.title: gsd-core
entry.content: GSD Core is a meta-prompting, context engineering, and spec-driven development system for AI coding agents.

entry.title: cli-printing-press
entry.content: Generate production Go CLIs from API descriptions or OpenAPI specs

entry.title: typescript-lsp
entry.content: TypeScript/JavaScript language server for enhanced code intelligence

entry.title: jdtls-lsp
entry.content: Java language server (Eclipse JDT.LS) for code intelligence

entry.title: hitl
entry.content: HITL AI-Driven Development. Set up a project with /hitl:dev-start-from-prd, /hitl:dev-start-brownfield, or /hitl:dev-start-migration. Then run /hitl:dev-start-change to start work on an issue — it picks the workflow, shows the step plan, and drives the breadcrumb. Run /hitl:help to find the right command for any situation.

entry.title: lsp-refactor
entry.content: Project-wide rename, file-move-with-importer-updates, and move-symbol via a real language server. Use this whenever a refactor touches more than one file — Claude Code's built-in LSP tool is READ-ONLY and cannot rename, move files, or move symbols. A text-only edit silently misses re-exports, aliased and type-only imports, and {@link} references; this plugin drives the LSP to catch every one.

entry.title: serena
entry.content: Semantic code analysis MCP server providing intelligent code understanding, refactoring suggestions, and codebase navigation through language server protocol integration.

entry.title: rust-analyzer-lsp
entry.content: Rust language server for code intelligence and analysis

entry.title: ltspice-mcp
entry.content: LTspice/ngspice circuit simulation with structured results — including per-device operating points (gm/gds/vth) read back by name, no rawfile parsing — plus LTspice .asc schematic editing, exposed as MCP tools. Tracks the latest ltspice-mcp release on PyPI.

entry.title: browser-harness
entry.content: Direct browser control via CDP. Drives the user's real Chrome (or a Browser Use cloud browser) with coordinate clicks, screenshots, and a Rust-native CLI — no selector hunting. Requires the one-time `browser-harness` Rust CLI install (see the skill's references/install.md).

entry.title: session-report
entry.content: Generate an explorable HTML report of Claude Code session usage — tokens, cache efficiency, subagents, skills, and the most expensive prompts — from local ~/.claude/projects transcripts.

entry.title: browser-harness
entry.content: Direct browser control via CDP. Drives the user's real Chrome (or a Browser Use cloud browser) with coordinate clicks, screenshots, and Python helpers — no selector hunting. Requires the one-time `browser-harness` CLI install (see the skill's references/install.md).

entry.title: ruby-lsp
entry.content: Ruby language server for code intelligence and analysis

entry.title: swift-lsp
entry.content: Swift language server (SourceKit-LSP) for code intelligence

entry.title: vesper-team-skills
entry.content: 100+ skills, 44 commands, and 6 workflows for AI-powered development. Multi-agent orchestration, code review, video production, browser automation, Unreal tooling, and more.

entry.title: helmet
entry.content: Full repo onboarding — bootstraps test infrastructure, wires CI/CD + security scanning, generates a project CLAUDE.md, and builds a CodeGraph index

entry.title: economist-agents
entry.content: Multi-agent content pipeline that generates Economist-style articles with verified sources, deterministic quality gates, and an Anthropic Agent SDK runtime.

entry.title: obsidian
entry.content: Create and edit Obsidian vault files including Markdown, Bases, and Canvas. Use when working with .md, .base, or .canvas files in an Obsidian vault.

entry.title: captains-cabinet
entry.content: An autonomous, self-improving AI organization framework for Claude Code — Captain (founder) + a roster-derived officer fleet with event-sourced missions, durable role registry, OVI measurement, and pattern-learning ledger. Three-layer architecture (framework + preset + instance) for product-agnostic deployment; presets ship role archetypes (work: functional officers, portfolio: Chair + generated lane CEOs), the instance roster (instance data, never packaged) decides what actually runs.

entry.title: security-guidance
entry.content: Security review for Claude-generated code. Pattern-based warnings on edits, LLM-powered diff review on Stop, and an agentic commit reviewer that catches injection, XSS, SSRF, hardcoded secrets, and 25+ other vulnerability classes.

entry.title: guild
entry.content: A team-of-specialists plugin for Claude Code: 14 domain specialists across engineering, content, and commercial groups, the v2 single-verb lifecycle (init · ideate · plan · build · qa · ops), a categorized wiki with decision capture, and a self-evolution loop with shadow-mode gating.

entry.title: strassenrecht-infrastruktur
entry.content: Straßenrecht-Plugin für Bundesfernstraßen, Landesstraßen, Gemeindestraßen, Widmung, Planfeststellung, Sondernutzung, Baulast und Erhaltung.

entry.title: frappe-agent
entry.content: Frappe, ERPNext, and Frappe ecosystem coding, customization, bench, and review intelligence for Claude Code and AI coding workflows.

entry.title: conduct-cli
entry.content: Conduct AI CLI — run agents, manage workspaces, and enforce AI usage policies with ConductGuard MCP. Includes conduct, conductguard-mcp, and conduct-mcp binaries.

entry.title: claude-code-toolkit
entry.content: Complete developer toolkit for Claude Code

entry.title: builder-skills
entry.content: Public Builder skills for docs-first discipline, autonomous execution, cross-agent review, efficient agent workflows, clear status recaps, and Agent-Native Plan modes.

entry.title: pyright-lsp-python
entry.content: Python LSP integration with Pyright for AI-assisted code navigation

entry.title: dev-loop
entry.content: An autonomous dev team in a folder. Nine agents (PM, QA, senior/junior Dev, Sweep, Reflect, Ops, Architect, Communication) build, test, ship, watch, and explain software through ticket state (Linear or the bundled local hub). 1.0 workspace model: Backlog-first intake gated by PM, sensitive-work design tier, one team scheduler with per-agent model/effort, instant incident alerts, and a daily director digest. Operator skills: add-project, add-repo, sync-project, sync-repo.

entry.title: better-godot-mcp
entry.content: Comprehensive Godot Engine integration — 17 tools for game development

entry.title: agent-skills
entry.content: Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents — covering the full software development lifecycle from spec to ship.

entry.title: andrej-karpathy-skills
entry.content: Karpathy Agent OS Starter Kit — self-improving AI coding system with error capture, failure mode identification, proposal-only rule improvements, and project registry to prevent rebuilding what already exists

entry.title: nlpm
entry.content: Natural-Language Programming Manager — score, check, fix, and test NL artifacts across Claude Code, Codex CLI, and Antigravity. Tier-aware scoring with per-tool overlays.

entry.title: kronael
entry.content: Installer for the Kronael toolkit. Trigger by saying 'install kronael', 'install kronael tools', or running /kronael:install. Deploys language patterns (go/py/rs/ts/sql), workflow commands (commit, ship, refine, diary), wisdom skill, and lifecycle hooks (compaction preservation, prompt nudges, stop checks) into ~/.claude/.

entry.title: claude-code-kit
entry.content: Discipline kit that turns Claude Code from eager intern to staff engineer. Hooks, skills, and CLAUDE.md rules for Plan → Confirm → Implement → Verify.

entry.title: ouroboros
entry.content: Self-improving AI workflow system. Crystallize requirements before execution with Socratic interview, ambiguity scoring, and 3-stage evaluation.

entry.title: context-grapple-gun
entry.content: Session learning system for Claude Code. Captures lessons as CogPRs, tracks signals via acoustic routing, promotes knowledge across scopes with human-gated review.

entry.title: copilotkit
entry.content: AI agent skills for CopilotKit — setup, develop, integrate, debug, upgrade, and contribute to CopilotKit projects

entry.title: marketing-pipeline
entry.content: Automated distribution pipeline for open source developer tools. Onboard a project from its README, launch to MCP Registry + directories, post to Bluesky/Dev.to/Hashnode/Mastodon, track engagement.

entry.title: bitwize-music
entry.content: AI music generation workflow for Suno - album concepts, lyrics, prompts, mastering, release

entry.title: wholework
entry.content: GitHub issue-driven Claude Code skills for agentic work

entry.title: claude-sf-toolkit
entry.content: Reusable Salesforce DX skills, agents, and project scaffolding for Claude Code

entry.title: belt
entry.content: Belt — the cloud platform for AI agents. Run 250+ AI apps, manage knowledge, search and publish skills, connect MCP servers.

entry.title: anthropic-docs
entry.content: Auto-updated multi-skill reference for the whole Anthropic doc ecosystem. 8 skills covering claude-code, claude-agent-sdk, anthropic-api, anthropic-platform-features, claude-connectors, claude-cowork, mcp-spec, and anthropic-pulse (news + research digests). Pipeline refreshes daily.

entry.title: okisdev
entry.content: Personal skills and agents collection by okisdev

entry.title: biomcp
entry.content: Biomedical search and evidence retrieval MCP server

entry.title: mahpastes
entry.content: Use mahpastes as a storage and serving backend for artifacts, websites, and research

entry.title: finance-skills
entry.content: Financial analysis and trading skills — options payoff charts, stock correlations, market data via yfinance, Twitter/Discord/Telegram research, and generative UI widgets.

entry.title: typo3-upgrade-effort-model
entry.content: Generic TYPO3 LTS upgrade effort model: per-version risk multipliers (v14: Fluid 5 strict VHs, HashService removal, TSFE removal, asset-pipeline removal), breaking-change baselines, version-compatibility matrix, Rector coverage adjustments, and a 7-phase assessment workflow. Calibration-free — pair with your own historical project data for tuned estimates.

entry.title: mcpserver-cowork
entry.content: Connect Claude Cowork to McpServer for marker-trusted TODO management, session logging, requirements tracking, GraphRAG operations, and local outage handoff recovery.

entry.title: Buddy
entry.content: Persistent AI coding companion with 21 species and personality stats.

entry.title: cortex
entry.content: Persistent memory for Claude Code — remembers across sessions automatically. Install and forget. Scientific retrieval backed by 97 published references.

entry.title: browser-harness
entry.content: Direct browser control via CDP. Drives the user's real Chrome (or a Browser Use cloud browser) with coordinate clicks, screenshots, and Python helpers — no selector hunting. Requires the one-time `browser-harness` CLI install (see the skill's references/install.md).

entry.title: typo3-a11y
entry.content: WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility patterns for TYPO3 projects

entry.title: festlandchina-wirtschaftsverkehr
entry.content: Mega-Plugin für wirtschaftlichen Umgang mit Festlandchina: Fabrik, Import, Export, Investition, De-Risking, Lieferkette, IP, Daten, Exportkontrolle und politisches Risiko.

entry.title: krankenhausrecht
entry.content: Super-Plugin für deutsches Krankenhausrecht: Planung, Finanzierung, Entgelte, Reform, Qualität, MD-Prüfung, Klinikbetrieb und Rechtsstreit.

entry.title: kommunalrecht-laender
entry.content: Großes Kommunalrecht-Plugin für Gemeinden, Städte, Landkreise, Satzungen, Räte, Bürgerbegehren, Kommunalfinanzen, Aufsicht und Landesrecht.

entry.title: memorandums-ersteller
entry.content: Wandelt Mandantenunterlagen in ein juristisches Memorandum mit Vier-Teile-Gliederung — Sachverhalt mit Quellenreferenz; Ein-Satz-Fragen; Ein-Satz-Antworten; rechtliche Ausführungen mit Pinpoint-Zitierung. Optional Piercing-Questions. Rechtsgebietsneutral. Alias Memorandumsmacher.

entry.title: energierecht
entry.content: Freistehendes Energierecht-Plugin für Stadtwerke, Versorger, Wärme, Netze, Vertrieb, Industrie, EEG, KWKG, Verfahren, Transaktionen und Projektfinanzierung.

entry.title: pyright-lsp
entry.content: Python language server (Pyright) for type checking and code intelligence

entry.title: typo3-vite
entry.content: Vite build setup, SCSS architecture, Bootstrap theming for TYPO3 v13+

entry.title: franchiserecht-praxis
entry.content: Wirtschaftsrechtliches Plugin für Franchise-Systeme: vorvertragliche Aufklärung, Handbuch, Gebühren, Gebietsschutz, Kartellrecht, Kündigung, Expansion, Streit und Insolvenz.

entry.title: last30days
entry.content: Research any topic from the last 30 days across Reddit, X, YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Hacker News, Polymarket, and the web.

entry.title: factoring-recht
entry.content: Super-Plugin für Factoring, Forderungskauf, Aufsichtsrecht, Vertragsgestaltung, Debitorenkommunikation, Insolvenz- und Sanierungsfragen.

entry.title: gewerblicher-rechtsschutz
entry.content: Gewerblicher Rechtsschutz – DPMA/EUIPO-Markenrecherche und -anmeldung, Freedom-to-Operate, Patentscreening, UWG- und Urheberrechts-Abmahnung (Versand und Reaktion), Open-Source-Compliance, IP-Klausel-Review, Schutzrechts-Fristen.

entry.title: gopls-lsp
entry.content: Go language server for code intelligence and refactoring

entry.title: security-guidance
entry.content: Security reminder hook that warns about potential security issues when editing files, including command injection, XSS, and unsafe code patterns

entry.title: fortbestehensprognose
entry.content: Fortbestehensprognose § 19 Abs. 2 InsO als Geschäftsführer-Selbstdokumentation. Bilanzstatus Annahmen Plausibilisierung Zwoelf-Monats-Liquidität. Sanierungsbausteine Patronatserklärung Comfortletter Rangrücktritt Stundung Forderungsverzicht. IDW S 11 StaRUG. Eskalation bei negativer Prognose.

entry.title: gesellschaftsrecht-legal-english
entry.content: Didaktisches Gesellschaftsrecht — English Business Terms: Corporate Legal English für Big-Law-Anfaenger. Dealroom: Cap Table vs Gesellschafterliste; Term Sheet; SHA; Vesting; Drag/Tag; Liquidation Preference; Anti-Dilution; SPA; DD; Notar/HR; Multi-Format-Auswertung; Frankfurt-Startup-Akte.

entry.title: mietrecht
entry.content: Mietrecht für Mieter und Vermieter mit ausschließlich amtlichen Mietspiegel-Quellen pro Bundesland und für Top- und Universitaetsstaedte. Datenerhebung Mieterhoehungs-Widerspruch Mietsenkungsverlangen Nebenkostenprüfung und Erstellung Mieteranfragen Klageentwurf zum Amtsgericht.

entry.title: fachanwalt-medizinrecht
entry.content: Plugin Fachanwalt für Medizinrecht. Arzthaftung §§ 630a ff. BGB Patientenrechte Vertragsarztrecht Berufsrecht Aerzte SGB V Krankenversicherung MPDG Apothekenrecht. Schnittstellen Plugin fachanwalt-sozialrecht und kanzlei-allgemein.

entry.title: forderungsmanagement-klagewerkstatt
entry.content: Klagewerkstatt für Forderungsmanagement mit Zuständigkeitsprüfung, Mahnvorlauf, Inkasso-Zahlungsklage und Anspruchs-Gatekeeper: Nur klare, fällige und belegte Forderungen werden zur Klage freigegeben.

entry.title: email-umformulierer-berufsrecht
entry.content: Formuliert unfreundliche, emotionale oder unsachliche E-Mails in hoefliche, sachliche und berufsrechtskonform formulierte Texte um. Fokus auf BRAO/BORA-Konformität, mit Varianten für Steuerberater, Notare und allgemeine berufliche Korrespondenz.

entry.title: chrisbanes-skills
entry.content: Skills for Kotlin, Android, JVM, and Jetpack Compose development by Chris Banes.

entry.title: gesellschaftsrechtliche-treuepflicht
entry.content: Großes Prüfplugin zur gesellschaftsrechtlichen Treuepflicht in GmbH, AG, SE, Personengesellschaft, Familiengesellschaft und Konzern: Stimmrecht, Minderheitenschutz, Gesellschafterliste, Einziehung, Ausschluss, Konkurrenz, Sanierung, Treuepflichtverletzung und Rechtsfolgen.

entry.title: ki-vo-ai-act-pruefer
entry.content: Mechanik-Workflow zur KI-VO (EU 2024/1689): KI-System-Definition, Rollen, Risikoklassen, Hochrisiko-Diagnose, GPAI, Art. 43-Konformitätsbewertung, CE/EU-DB, Marktbeobachtung, Konformitäts-Evidence-Pack, KI-Kompetenz, Shadow-AI, Berufsrecht, Hochschul- und Behördenpraxis.

entry.title: ecc
entry.content: Harness-native ECC plugin for engineering teams - 67 agents, 278 skills, 94 legacy command shims, reusable hooks, rules, MCP conventions, and operator workflows for Claude Code plus adjacent agent harnesses

entry.title: fachanwalt-strafrecht
entry.content: Plugin Fachanwalt Strafrecht: StPO/StGB, Nebenstrafrecht, Verteidigung, Ermittlungsverfahren, HV, Revision, Nebenklage und Zeugenbeistand plus Strafprozess-Cockpit für Fristen, Aktenlog, U-Haft, Akteneinsicht, HV-Tagesmappe, Antragslog und Mandanteninstruktionen.

entry.title: context7
entry.content: Fetch up-to-date library documentation via Context7 REST API

entry.title: fachanwalt-bau-architektenrecht
entry.content: Plugin Fachanwalt für Bau- und Architektenrecht. BGB Werkvertrag VOB-A VOB-B VOB-C HOAI Bauordnungsrecht. Bauvertrag Maengelhaftung Abnahme Vergaberecht. Schnittstellen Plugin fachanwalt-vergaberecht kanzlei-allgemein.

entry.title: terraform
entry.content: The Terraform MCP Server provides seamless integration with Terraform ecosystem, enabling advanced automation and interaction capabilities for Infrastructure as Code (IaC) development.

entry.content: Schema validation, data quality monitoring, streaming validation pipelines, and input validation for backend APIs
